originalTitle: Championship clubs reject bringing in VAR next season

originalTitle: Bellingham invests in Birmingham Hundred franchise

originalTitle: Brady steps down as West Ham vice-chair
originalDescription: Baroness Karren Brady steps down as vice-chair of Premier League side West Ham after 16 years.

originalTitle: Midtjylland's Djabi seriously injured in stabbing
originalDescription: Midtjylland midfielder Alamara Djabi is in a stable condition having been seriously injured in a stabbing in Denmark, his club says.

originalTitle: Dos Santos signs first contract after bar fire
originalDescription: Metz defender Tahirys dos Santos, who survived a Swiss bar fire on New Year's Eve that killed 41 people, says "this ordeal made me stronger".

originalTitle: Saints trail; Millwall lead | Coventry eye title & Leicester heading down - EFL on Sky LIVE!

originalDescription: Ronnie O’Sullivan started with a rare Crucible misstep but still emerged with a 7-2 lead after the opening session of his first-round match against China’s He Guoqiang at the World Snooker Championship in Sheffield.

originalTitle: EFL clubs reject VAR challenge system in Championship
originalDescription: EFL clubs have opposed the introduction of a VAR challenge system for managers in the Championship.

originalDescription: Ahead of the summer transfer window and the conclusion of the Championship season, a number of players are already generating interest from the Premier League.

originalTitle: Whittaker says his showboating can lead to 'complete domination’
